location: Portland, OR (hybrid, 3 days/week; also SLC / Fargo / Boise / Lewiston / Renton)

reason: RULE-0 / §0.2 FABRICATION TRAP CONFIRMED IN THE LIVE JD. This is the exact role that created Jamie's #1 fabrication lesson, and the full JD confirms why. The role's PRIMARY, defining duties are ERG management, community-building program expansion, employee-club growth, and Foundation/volunteer partnerships — the exact `cover_truth_gate.LACKS_HANDSON` set Jamie has NO hands-on track record in. A truthful package cannot make her read as a MATCH (vs. a merely interested applicant) without relabeling her engagement-analysis / DEI-pilot / OD-diagnostic / program-management experience as ERG/community/culture-program management. Per the zero-quality-degradation doctrine and the explicit dispatch instruction ('If you cannot build a truthful Cambia application without relabeling, STOP and mark it staged-needs-human-review rather than fabricate'), no package was built and nothing was submitted.
jd_primary_duties_verbatim: Serve as the primary HR point of contact and program manager for Cambia's Employee Resource Groups
Support ERG leaders with programming, logistics, development resources, and visibility
Help grow and sustain employee clubs and communities across the organization
Drive expansion of Blue Squad and similar community-building programs to all Cambia office locations
Partner with the Cambia Foundation to identify and build community-based cultural opportunities
Connect employee volunteerism and community engagement to the broader culture strategy
jd_qualifications_verbatim: 3-5 years of experience in employee engagement, culture, inclusion, talent, communications, or related HR/people functions, with experience embedding inclusive practices into employee or talent programs; Familiarity with Employee Resource Groups, employee communities, or volunteer/foundation partnerships a plus.
honest_overlap: PARTIAL and adjacent only. Real, sourceable overlap: (1) program/event management with multiple stakeholders (InGenius 20+ programs, 600+ webinar participants, vendor/cross-functional coordination); (2) engagement work via DATA ANALYSIS (NextGen 2,000+ employee responses to C-suite); (3) DEI/inclusion via the Vestas Inclusive-Leadership pilot (12 -> 23 locations) + NextGen DEI consulting; (4) cross-functional partnership with HRBP/Comms-type stakeholders. The JD's INCLUSION half ('embedding inclusive practices across the talent lifecycle') has genuine overlap with the Vestas/NextGen DEI evidence.
honest_gap: The COMMUNITY half — ERG ownership, employee-club growth, Blue-Squad-style community-building program expansion, Foundation/volunteer-partnership building — is the role's #1 listed bucket and is exactly what Jamie has NOT done. content_library/voice_corpus confirm no ERG/employee-club/foundation-partnership management; the closest items (InGenius 'support internal HR initiatives on culture-building' = a small side-assist; Global Shapers volunteer = remote hiring/onboarding revamp, NOT community-building) do not credibly cover the core.

The LinkedIn JD contained NO explicit no-sponsor / ITAR / citizenship clause (so NOT a hard blocker on that axis), but willingness is unverified. odn_relabel_check: CONFIRMED CLEAN. ODN Oregon was NOT relabeled as community-building/ERG/member-events anywhere — no package was written at all, so there is nothing to relabel. The whole point of staging was to avoid exactly that relabel.
recommended_human_options: A) PASS — honest verdict is the role's primary function (ERG/community/foundation-partnership ownership) is a genuine gap; Jamie would be applying as an interested-but-not-matched candidate to a role whose #1 duty she hasn't done. Cleanest given RULE-0.

B) APPLY HONESTLY AS A STRETCH — only if Jamie/David explicitly accept a resume+cover that lead with her REAL evidence (program/event mgmt + engagement-data + Vestas/NextGen DEI/inclusion) and frame the ERG/community/foundation work as the role's work she'd GROW INTO (aspiration framing the cover gate permits), with an explicit honest 'I haven't owned ERGs directly' line. This will read as a clear stretch, not a match — acceptable ONLY with human sign-off, never as a silent auto-submit.
C) Sponsor-verify first — confirm Cambia will sponsor a People role before spending effort either way.
ats_discovered: Not opened. The LinkedIn public apply link is a signup wall (offsite contextual sign-in). Real ATS not pursued because the role was staged at the truth gate before any build/drive step. (Cambia careers typically Workday — confirm at build time if option B is chosen.)
